question: Is the offence committed against the Government of India?

yes.question: Is the offence related to waging war or attempting to wage war?

yes.name: Waging, or attempting to wage war, or abetting waging of war, against Government of India

no.question: Is the offence related to conspiracy or overawing the Government?

yes.name: Conspiracy to commit offences punishable by section 147

no.question: Is the offence related to collecting arms or preparing to wage war?

yes.name: Collecting arms, etc., with intention of waging war against Government of India

no.question: Is the offence related to concealing a design to wage war?

yes.name: Concealing with intent to facilitate design to wage war

no.question: Is the offence related to assaulting a President, Governor, etc.?

yes.name: Assaulting President, Governor, etc., with intent to compel or restrain exercise of any lawful power

no.question: Is the offence related to endangering sovereignty, unity and integrity of India?

yes.name: Act endangering sovereignty, unity and integrity of India

no.question: Is the offence related to waging war against a foreign State at peace with Government of India?

yes.name: Waging war against Government of any foreign State at peace with Government of India

no.question: Is the offence related to committing depredation on territories of a foreign State at peace with Government of India?

yes.name: Committing depredation on territories of foreign State at peace with Government of India

no.question: Is the offence related to receiving property taken by war or depredation?

yes.name: Receiving property taken by war or depredation mentioned in sections 153 and 154

no.question: Is the offender a public servant?

yes.question: Did the public servant voluntarily allow a prisoner to escape?

yes.name: Public servant voluntarily allowing prisoner of State or war to escape

no.question: Did the public servant negligently suffer a prisoner to escape?

yes.name: Public servant negligently suffering such prisoner to escape

no.name: Aiding escape of, rescuing or harbouring such prisoner
Aiding escape of, rescuing or harbouring such prisoner
Assaulting President, Governor, etc., with intent to compel or restrain exercise of any lawful power

sections.name: Waging, or attempting to wage war, or abetting waging of war, against Government of India.
Conspiracy to commit offences punishable by section 147.
Collecting arms, etc., with intention of waging war against Government of India.
Concealing with intent to facilitate design to wage war.
Assaulting President, Governor, etc., with intent to compel or restrain exercise of any lawful power.
Act endangering sovereignty, unity and integrity of India.
Waging war against Government of any foreign State at peace with Government of India.
Committing depredation on territories of foreign State at peace with Government of India.
Receiving property taken by war or depredation mentioned in sections 153 and 154.
Public servant voluntarily allowing prisoner of State or war to escape.
Public servant negligently suffering such prisoner to escape.
Aiding escape of, rescuing or harbouring such prisoner.
